description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a blue vertical siding exterior and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The house features large, rectangular windows on both floors, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. A gray shingled roof covers both the main structure and the porch, while a fenced backyard area includes a small outbuilding and a mature tree. The upper floor has a partially open terrace or balcony, visible from above, and the rear of the house includes a private patio area with outdoor seating. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some windows spanning nearly the full height of the walls. The overall design blends modern and craftsman elements, with clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story blue house with large windows, a front porch, and a fenced backyard featuring a small outbuilding and tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main porch with white columns, large front windows, and the entry steps.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the fenced backyard, small outbuilding, patio area, and a large tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard fence, outbuilding, patio seating, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the house's blue siding, large side window, and the full length of the porch roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with white columns, steps, and a single main door
